backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the full backend: posts, college connects, wishlists, user/student profiles, DMs, community chat, and feedback, with blob storage and role-based access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI palette-update features (violet/black/pink/yellow theme in index.css, tailwind.config.js, and SparkParticles.tsx) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build/documentation reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining shadcn-style OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using a neutral (gray/white) palette without the violet/pink/yellow overrides.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title set to 'Mem Nerchukunnavi | మేము నేర్చుకున్నవి', a custom favicon, and Open Graph meta tags for the app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with eight routes, wrapping the app in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and ToastProvider, and playing a bubble-pop sound on route changes.
Displays a single community chat message with an author avatar, year badge colored by college year, relative timestamp, and warm-toned card styling.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectFo: A form component that lets students submit college tips with fields for college name, year, and tip text, including validation and toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectLi: Displays a scrollable list of college connect tips fetched from the backend, showing college name, year badge, tip text, and relative timestamp, with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/components/DMConversationPa: A modal panel for direct messaging between students, displaying a sorted conversation history and a message input form with send functionality and toast error handling.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A form component for submitting user feedback with name, year, and feedback text fields, including validation, character limits, and toast notifications.
Renders a list of feedback entries with author avatar, year badge, and relative timestamp, handling loading skeletons, admin-only authorization errors, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, brand logo, year badge, mute toggle, and a mobile hamburger menu wrapping page content.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a clickable post card with category badge, year badge, bookmark toggle, upvote count, and time-ago display, linking to the post detail page.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Provides share buttons for a single post via WhatsApp, clipboard copy, and native share API.
frontend/src/components/ShareWebsiteButt: Renders a promotional share panel for the whole site with WhatsApp, copy-link, and native share buttons.
frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.t: Renders 16 animated floating pill particles across a stratified grid overlay, each labeled with a college year and styled with random colors.
frontend/src/components/StudentCard.tsx: Displays a student profile card with avatar, name, college, year badge, availability indicator, and a DM button.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: Form component for registering a student profile with name, college year, college name, and availability toggle, with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ToastContainer.t: Renders a fixed bottom-right stack of animated toast notifications (success, error, info) with icons and dismiss buttons, consuming the useToast hook.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Full-screen modal that prompts the user to select their college year and optionally enter a college name, persisting the selection via useYearSelection.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for toggling between English and Telugu languages, persisting the choice in sessionStorage and exposing a translation helper `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context with login/clear functions and status flags, backed by DFINITY's AuthClient and exposed via a provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including posts, stats, wishlist, and college connect CRUD operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useToast.ts: Provides a ToastContext with showToast and dismissToast functions, auto-dismissing toasts after 3.5 seconds using ref-tracked timers.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Manages per-session wishlist state for a given post, generating a UUID session key and exposing a toggle function backed by add/remove mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Reads and writes the user's selected college year and college name to sessionStorage, dispatching a custom event on year selection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive CSS custom property palette (violet/pink/yellow) for both light and dark themes including sidebar and grid tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying a hero banner, mission statement, feature highlights, and share buttons for the Memu Nerchukunnavi student experience-sharing platform.
frontend/src/pages/AvailableStudents.tsx: Page listing students who are open to direct messages, with a grid of StudentCards, a DM conversation panel, a sender name prompt flow, and a registration modal to mark yourself available.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityChat.tsx: Community chat page that fetches and displays live chat messages sorted chronologically, and provides a form for students to post new messages with name, year, and message validation.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page showing platform stats (total posts and per-category counts) with skeleton loading states, alongside feedback display, a feedback submission form, and college connect list and form sections.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main feed page that displays posts filtered by category (All, Internships, Hackathons, Courses, General), with a hero banner, share buttons, optional year personalization banner, and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Detail view for a single post identified by URL param `id`, showing category badge, author year, bookmark toggle, share buttons, and a back link to the feed.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Form page that lets users select a category and write up to 1000 characters to submit a new experience post, with validation, toast feedback, and a year-selection modal gate.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: Displays the current session's bookmarked posts by cross-referencing wishlist IDs with all posts, showing a grid of PostCards or an empty-state prompt.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for the entire app, covering navigation, categories, home page, share page, year selection modal, and footer copy.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides mute-aware Web Audio API utilities: `playBubblePop` for a short tonal burst on interactions and `playTypingTick` for a crisp noise tick on keystrokes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, a full color token system using OKLCH CSS variables (including sidebar and violet/pink/yellow/black palette tokens), border radii, and spark-float keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording existing features (violet/black/pink/yellow color scheme updates across CSS, Tailwind, and SparkParticles), a pending color scheme change request, and project metadata.
